mainHtml:
Supplier Diversity

A Minority- & Women-Owned Healthcare Cleaning Partner

Dory’s Cleaning Services is a Black-owned, women-owned environmental services company specializing exclusively in clinical-grade cleaning for licensed healthcare facilities across Massachusetts. We help hospitals, health systems, and universities meet supplier-diversity goals with a vendor that also brings 22+ years of hands-on clinical expertise.

Why Partner With Dory’s

A rare combination for procurement and supplier-diversity teams.

Meets Diversity Goals

As a Minority- and Women-Owned Business Enterprise (MBE/WBE), partnering with Dory’s counts toward your organization’s supplier-diversity spend targets.

Recurring EVS Category

Environmental Services (EVS) cleaning is a recurring, contractable category — a dependable way to grow diverse spend year over year.

Clinical Differentiator

Unlike generic janitorial vendors, we bring 22+ years inside clinical environments, CDC/OSHA-compliant protocols, and compliance documentation on every visit.

Certifications & Credentials

We are actively pursuing formal diverse-supplier certifications. Current status:

WBE — WBENC

Certification in progress
Women’s Business Enterprise National Council

MBE — NMSDC

Certification in progress
National Minority Supplier Development Council

MA SDO (MBE/WBE)

Certification in progress
Massachusetts Operational Services Division

Licensed (MA HIC #213341) · $2M insured · NAICS 561720 (Janitorial Services)

Core Competencies

  • Medical office & clinic sanitation
  • Ambulatory / outpatient & surgery centers
  • Rehabilitation & nursing facilities
  • Terminal cleaning & between-patient turnover
  • Infection control — CDC/OSHA-compliant protocols, EPA-registered disinfectants
  • Compliance documentation & quality-control reporting included on every visit

Add Dory’s to Your Diverse Supplier Database

Request our capability statement or schedule a complimentary facility assessment for any of your sites.
